tree._: Concern clock. Tree block: depth IS temporal scale. Pscale 9 (year) at root, descending to pscale 1 (second). Digit at each depth = concern aspect at that scale. Nodes with 'last' are live instances — phase = (now - last) / period_at_depth. No period map: depth IS period.

1._: System coherence. The self-concern thread from season to second.
